name: houseclean
description: >- Cross-drive storage audit and cleanup. Surveys all drives, finds orphaned git worktrees, large AI tool caches (.ollama, .gemini, .cursor, npm, pip), and buildable artifacts (node_modules, .venv). Produces a prioritized action plan with specific migration commands. Use when disk space is low or worktrees need cleanup; do NOT use for project structure issues (use /organize instead).
author: SethGammon
